languages.text: "Что-то не так. Ваши люди... они больны, полковник?"
"Something is wrong here. Your people... are they sick, Colonel?"
languages.original_text: "Что-то не так. Ваши люди... они больны, полковник?"

traits.locale_text: "Something is wrong here. Your people... are they sick, Colonel?"
"Something is wrong here. Your people... are they sick, Colonel?"
"Something is wrong here. Your people... are they sick, Colonel?"
"Something is wrong here. Your people... are they sick, Colonel?"

languages.text: 「何かおかしい。君たちの...病気じゃないか、大佐？」
languages.original_text: "Something is wrong here. Your people... are they sick, Colonel?"

traits.locale_text: 「何かおかしい。君たちの...病気じゃないか、大佐？」

languages.text: “这里有些不对劲。你的人……他们病了吗，上校？”
languages.original_text: "Something is wrong here. Your people... are they sick, Colonel?"

traits.locale_text: “这里有些不对劲。你的人……他们病了吗，上校？”

languages.text: "Irgendwas stimmt hier nicht. Eure Leute ... sind sie krank, Colonel?"
languages.original_text: "Something is wrong here. Your people... are they sick, Colonel?"

traits.locale_text: "Irgendwas stimmt hier nicht. Eure Leute ... sind sie krank, Colonel?"

languages.text: « Il y a quelque chose de louche par ici. Vos troupes... seraient-elles malades, colonel ? »
languages.original_text: "Something is wrong here. Your people... are they sick, Colonel?"

traits.locale_text: « Il y a quelque chose de louche par ici. Vos troupes... seraient-elles malades, colonel ? »

languages.text: «Aquí pasa algo. Coronel... ¿su gente está enferma?».
languages.original_text: "Something is wrong here. Your people... are they sick, Colonel?"

traits.locale_text: «Aquí pasa algo. Coronel... ¿su gente está enferma?».

languages.text: "Burada bir terslik var. Bu insanlar... Hasta mı Albay?"
languages.original_text: "Something is wrong here. Your people... are they sick, Colonel?"

traits.locale_text: "Burada bir terslik var. Bu insanlar... Hasta mı Albay?"
